Join us TONIGHT  for our May  
PTA General Meeting ! 
Wednesday, May 13th
8:00-9:00 PM ET via Zoom
Click to join
Meeting ID: 825 3357 5692
Password: 993340
We look forward to seeing you there!

calendar of events for

In lieu of ticket sales, we are collecting
donations of shelf-stable pantry items to
donate to a local Food Bank - dropoff at event

The PTA executive board has several positions open for the 2022 -
2023 school year. Help enrich your child's St. Cloud experience!
Scan the QR code for details.
Consider joining a fantastic group of parents to
help enrich your child's St. Cloud experience for the
2026-27 school year.
 OPEN POSITIONS:
President (1)
President Elect (VP) (1)
Treasurer (2)
Membership (1)
5th Grade Committee Chairs (2)
ASP Junior Coordinator (assists ASP Chair) (1)
Grants Committee (1)
Communications (1)
Diversity Council Chair or Co-Chairs
Events Committee
The PTA executive board has
several positions open for
the 2026 - 2027 school year. Scan
the QR code for details. 
Apply by May 31st.J O IN  T H E
P T A  B O A R D
